ui.equip_hint: Click a tower on the map to equip the item
ui.main_menu.subtitle: Prehistoric Totem Guardian
tutorial.step_0:
Welcome to TiggyTD!
You are the tribe's Totem Guardian,
commanding prehistoric animals to defend your home.
tutorial.step_1:
Right-click on empty ground
to move your hero to a new position!
tutorial.step_2:
Click 'Cheetah' in the bottom panel,
then click an empty tile
to place your first animal tower!
tutorial.step_3:
Great! Click the 'Start Next Wave' button
in the top right
to summon prehistoric creatures!
tutorial.step_4:
Animal towers are fighting!
Your hero's aura boosts attack power
of nearby towers.
Wait for the wave to end…
tutorial.step_5:
Wave cleared!
Press [Q] to use your hero skill
'Apex Roar'!
tutorial.step_6:
Enter the shop!
Spend Ancient Marks on powerful items,
then close the shop to continue…
tutorial.step_7:
Tutorial complete!
Defend against 10 waves of enemies
and protect the tribe's totem!
ui.item_shop.title: Item Shop
